meaning: adv.諠雁ｼょ慍,蜊ｱ髯ｩ蝨ｰ,逾樒ｧ伜慍
examples: He looked uncannily like someone I knew.
A wooden artefact found on the step pyramid at Saqqara looks uncannily like a modern glider.
The Web search site is fast, simple and uncannily accurate at finding exactly the site needed.
Richly mulched beds of flowers are everywhere, bursting uncannily into bloom just as the tournament begins.
